of daniel zapata arenas daniel zapata arenas 31, pedro rico, 28029 madrid, spain +34 913148052 d.zapata.arenas@gmail.com mobile: +34 650055087 spanish 22 november 1984 male august 2007 onwards engineer / technical manager (full-time) research and software development on air traffic management and global navigation satellite systems application to civil aviation. more specifically: aircraft trajectory prediction and optimization, flight planning, air traffic flow management, gnss-based navigation performance prediction and monitoring, aeronautical gnss procedures assessment and gnss notam generation. gmv aerospace and defence, 11 isaac newton, tres cantos (spain) aerospace and defence september 2006 - june 2007 trainee (part-time) research on radar systems and their application to air traffic surveillance. polytechnic university of madrid, 30 avenida complutense, madrid (spain) january 2009 - december 2009 master in space technology aerospace and telecommunications engineering fundamentals, space systems engineering, space project management and space systems applications. polytechnic university of madrid september 2002 - june 2007 telecommunications engineering with specialization in radio communications systems. given a scholarship for distinguished academic performance. engineering fundamentals (maths, physics...) and further training in electronics, computer science and communications. specialization included, among others, radar systems and radio navigation. polytechnic university of madrid for more information on europass go to http://europass.cedefop.europa.eu european communities, 2003 20060628 dates title of qualification awarded name and type of organisation providing education and training personal skills and competences mother tongue(s) other language(s) self-assessment european level (*) english french social skills and competences organisational skills and competences technical skills and competences computer skills and competences other skills and competences driving licence publications additional information page 2/2 -
